name: resize_image
description: Resize an image to specific dimensions via URL parameters. Supports multiple fit modes to control how the image is scaled relative to the target dimensions.

parameters.name: fit
parameters.description: Fit mode: clip (default, preserves aspect ratio), crop, fill, fillmax, max, min, scale.

parameters.name: dpr
parameters.description: Device pixel ratio multiplier (1-5). Use 2 for retina displays.

parameters.name: ar
parameters.description: Target aspect ratio (e.g., '16:9', '1:1'). Used with fit=crop.

body.note: Returns the resized image binary directly. Content-Type header reflects the output format (e.g., image/jpeg).
